1stHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 1st house lord in the 1st house:- When the ascendant lord is in the ascendant itself, the native is seen to be disease-free, strong, handsome, highly respected, restless, benefiting from the government, happy, luxurious, wealthy, devoted to good deeds, and famous. The person is capable of making the right decisions and is a scholar. Such a person usually achieves success in life. Due to this, they become happy, healthy, prosperous, and long-lived. If the ascendant lord is afflicted by malefic planets, the person's health remains weak, and due to an unstable mindset, they start engaging in unethical acts.
1stHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 1st house lord in the 2nd house:- If the ascendant lord is in the second house, the person is wealthy, has a strong physique, is a ruler of their residence, capable, devoted to good deeds, long-lived, surrounded by family members, and very polite. The person is learned, good-natured, and religious. Such people get good success in business and are also far-sighted. They may have a special interest in subjects like astrology and psychology. Due to the ascendant lord being in the second house, such people earn money through their own efforts, so they never feel a lack of wealth. These people live harmoniously with their family members, love them, and take good care of them. Such a person may have a strong interest in food. If the ascendant lord is afflicted, contrary to all these qualities, the person will be cruel, hateful towards family members, lustful, selfish, and greedy for money.
1stHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 1st house lord in the 3rd house:- With the ascendant lord in the third house, the person is the best among many relatives, surrounded by friends, has a religious mindset, is generous, courageous, powerful, endowed with all kinds of wealth, and is weak towards the opposite sex. The person is attracted to short journeys. They will have an interest in traveling within the country and abroad. They may work for the development of arts. Being a scholar, they are blessed with all kinds of happiness. Such people can become famous as distinguished artists like musicians, dancers, actors, athletes, writers, or mathematicians. If the ascendant lord is weak, it creates impurity. If aspected by benefic planets, the native is seen to be sweet-spoken.
1stHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 1st house lord in the 4th house:- With the ascendant lord in the fourth house, the person is beloved by high-ranking officials, long-lived, and virtuous. They have many friends, are devoted to their parents, happy, luxurious, own property, are fond of food, and their father prospers. This placement is considered a factor for Raj Yoga. Such people show interest in spiritual subjects and wealth and prosperity keep coming to them. This person loves their parents very much. Such a person receives adequate happiness from house, vehicle, relatives, and parents. The presence of the ascendant lord in the fourth house is considered an indicator of fame, wealth, and knowledge, and is also auspicious for the mother's prosperity. According to Sage Parashara, the person receives much happiness from their parents, does not suffer any kind of sorrow, and is full of comforts.
1stHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 1st house lord in the 5th house:- If the ascendant lord is situated in the fifth house, the person has sons, is charitable, capable, famous, polite, engaged in good deeds, self-sacrificing, forgiving, humble, devoted to good deeds, and long-lived. It is not auspicious for their first child. Such a person has a good voice and may be fond of singing. The person is blessed with a middle child, is attracted to government work, and is knowledgeable. If the ascendant lord is a benefic planet, they are going to get higher education. Such people are famous, beloved by rulers, highly educated, and have artistic tendencies. Along with this, the person is a lover of sports and entertainment, gets happiness from children, and is successful.
1stHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 1st house lord in the 6th house:- If the ascendant lord is located in the sixth house, the person has land and property, is strong, miserly, a destroyer of enemies, wealthy, and is happy and brave with their son, mother, maternal uncle, and animals. They can create enemies through their body, mind, and speech. The presence of the ascendant lord in the sixth house gives inauspicious results. The person is physically weak. But if the ascendant lord is in an auspicious position and aspected by benefic planets, the person will be healthy and interested in sports. If the lord of the sixth house is strong, the person will get a high post in the medical field or army. But if the ascendant lord in this house is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, it is not auspicious from a health perspective. If the ascendant lord is a malefic planet, it also makes the person sick and in debt. The person will also face danger from enemies.
1stHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 1st house lord in the 7th house:- If the ascendant lord is located in the seventh house, the person is bright, cultured, of good character, humble, and beautiful. Their spouse is virtuous, beautiful, and bright. They do not act by listening to others. Because the person is polite and progressive, they get a beautiful, polite life partner. The spouse of such a person also loves them very much. The person continues to get happiness from travel and tourism, their health will be good, and they will attain happiness and prosperity.
1stHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 1st house lord in the 8th house:- If the ascendant lord is situated in the eighth house, the person is miserly, accumulates wealth, and is long-lived. If aspected by benefic planets, they are intelligent, receive respect and praise, and are of a soft nature. The person is intelligent, virtuous, of a gentle nature, religious, and successful. But when the ascendant lord is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, the person suffers from serious and incurable diseases, and their body remains sickly. They accumulate wealth, are greedy, and miserly. That person considers money as God.
1stHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 1st house lord in the 9th house:- If the ascendant lord is located in the ninth house, the person is eloquent, bright, happy, virtuous, a pure soul, famous, receives respect from high-ranking officials, is respected among people, religious, and accompanied by brothers and friends. The person is loved by people, has faith in God, is skilled in their workplace, a powerful speaker, forgiving, and fortunate. Such people earn a lot of fame by acting according to the scriptures. Due to their qualities and deeds, the person can become famous in the country as well as abroad and earn a good reputation in society. The person is of good character, full of moral qualities, polite, and a skilled human being.
1stHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 1st house lord in the 10th house:- If the ascendant lord is situated in the tenth house, the person is learned, intelligent, a friend of high officials, respects elders i.e., mother, etc., and is happy with them, famous, an enjoyer, and a doer of good deeds. They are a well-wisher of siblings. The person is courageous. They earn money through their hard work. Apart from being famous for their deeds, they also get a high position in the government sector. The person respects their parents very much. Besides this, they are devoted to their guru and God. The person is educated, successful, and easily gets all comforts and luxuries from the father. But if the ascendant lord is weak, such results are not obtained.
1stHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 1st house lord in the 11th house:- If the ascendant lord is situated in the eleventh house, the person is accompanied by friends and relatives, has sons, is an expert in economics, famous, radiant, powerful, long-lived, happy with vehicles etc., sensible, and thoughtful. The person is virtuous, successful, learned, and enhances the father's fame. That person is rich in wealth, happy with children, and enjoys a long life. Such a person gets financial benefits and happiness with the help of friends. Therefore, such a person is wealthy in terms of money. That person enjoys excellent happiness from sons and children. During the dasha-antardasha of the ascendant lord, the person keeps progressing, gets various kinds of authority, along with wealth and fame. But if the ascendant lord is weak, such results are not obtained.
1stHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 1st house lord in the 12th house:- If the ascendant lord is located in the twelfth house, the person is harsh-spoken, has enemies, and is an expatriate. They constantly have disputes with relatives, and the more facilities the person gets, the more they spend, but there is no lack of money for essential tasks. The person uses their wealth for charity, philanthropy, and virtuous deeds. If the ascendant lord is inauspicious, the person loses money due to spending on unnecessary tasks, lack of physical happiness, and migration or separation from relatives. Since the twelfth house is the place of salvation, the person may be attracted towards spirituality.

2ndHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 1st house:- When the second lord is situated in the ascendant, the person can be miserly, have a business mindset, be wealthy and famous among the rich, hardworking, reluctant to spend, luxurious, happy, benefited by the government, and a doer of good deeds. This position makes the person cruel and ruthless by nature. But if the lord of the second house is in an auspicious position, the person gets a lot of success in business. Such a person earns a lot of money due to which they are loved the most in the family, but such people are also of a selfish nature who want to achieve fame only for themselves.
2ndHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 2nd house:- If the second lord is situated in the second house itself, the person is wealthy, interested in religious activities, greedy, charitable, has a large family, and has control over their senses. The person achieves a lot of success in their life. They may get the happiness of children late. The person is extremely wealthy and achieves fame on the basis of wealth. Due to accumulating a lot of money, they can become very arrogant.
2ndHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 3rd house:- If the second lord is situated in the third house, the person is a businessman, involved in disputes, and lacks humility. If the second lord is the Sun, they are seen to have enmity with brothers; if Mars, they have a tendency to steal; and if Saturn, they are seen to be friendless. If the second lord is a malefic planet, the person is enterprising, valorous, victorious, and proud of acquiring wealth. The person is very courageous and capable of fulfilling their dreams on the strength of their own efforts. Due to courage and valor, they can become very arrogant. These people get special benefits through music, dance, and art.
2ndHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 4th house:- If the second lord is situated in the fourth house, the person is the owner of ancestral wealth, believes in a joint business mindset, is truthful, kind, radiant, and long-lived. Happiness increases in the person's life, they also get the happiness of vehicles and construction, and such a person provides materials of happiness in their home and family. The person gets a lot of happiness from parents. If the person's second lord is a malefic planet, the person becomes miserly by nature. They do not care about anyone and like to spend money only on themselves. The person's material comforts decrease and they may also be deprived of the mother's happiness. If the second lord is a malefic planet, the mother suffers during the dasha and antardasha. If the second lord is aspected by benefic planets, the above-mentioned auspicious results will be obtained, and if aspected by malefic planets, the person will face losses and illness during the dasha-antardasha period.
2ndHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 5th house:- If the second lord is situated in the fifth house, the person is blessed with sons, miserly, sorrowful in nature, gains fame by doing good deeds, luxurious, and happy. If the second lord is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, they will be generous. The person's son will be very rich and will get auspicious results in the field of education. If aspected or influenced by malefic planets, they will be a miser. They will be unhappy and wicked towards their children. The person will have to go through various kinds of dangers in their life. The person does not love their family and such a person is extremely interested in establishing sexual relations to enjoy sexual pleasure.
2ndHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 6th house:- If the second lord is situated in the sixth house, the person is an expert in accumulating wealth and is capable of ruling everywhere, but their wealth is destroyed by enemies. The person is ungrateful. Such people can earn money through evil deeds, so many of them become enemies and deal in money with enemies, although these people emerge victorious over enemies. The wealth accumulated by such a person is wasted through the son. If the second lord is aspected or conjoined by a malefic planet or if the second lord is itself a malefic planet, then the person is penniless, troubled by enemies, and unhappy. Still, they will be victorious over enemies and will be extremely valorous. Problems will keep coming from time to time.
2ndHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 7th house:- If the second lord is situated in the seventh house, the person progresses through the life partner, enjoys luxury, and is a giver of happiness. The person accumulates wealth after the arrival of the life partner, meaning such a person gets a wealth-saving life partner. The person also gets the opportunity to travel abroad, and such a person gets considerable success in the field of medical science. If the second lord is a malefic planet, there is a possibility of family problems. Due to the second lord being in the seventh house, the person is handsome but surrounded by worries, and the life partner can be afflicted with diseases.
2ndHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 8th house:- If the second lord is situated in the eighth house, the person is quarrelsome, suicidal, luxurious, and wealthy. They are able to earn by any means. Such a person gets less happiness from the life partner, gains from friends, does not get the good fortune of an elder brother, but receives land property. The person is of violent nature and resorts to unethical activities like gambling and betting to accumulate wealth. Their wife is often sickly. The person themselves destroys their ancestral property.
2ndHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 9th house:- If the second lord is situated in the ninth house, the person is a donor, interested in good deeds, famous, fortunate, and powerful. If malefic planets are present in the ninth house, the person lacks money at times and becomes a miser. If the second lord is a benefic planet, the person is happy, famous, and rich. The person likes to give charity, which makes them a philanthropic natured person. Such people are very lucky and financially fortunate, due to which they earn a lot of money in life. If there is a malefic planet, money-related problems will keep coming in life. Due to the second lord being in the ninth house, the person remains sickly in childhood.
2ndHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 10th house:- If the second lord is situated in the tenth house, the person gains from the government, is the protector of brothers and father, famous, handsome, learned, respectable, lustful, beloved by the opposite sex, and rich with wealth given by the king. Such a person is going to earn money from the government and accumulates a lot of wealth in life. Such a person has more interest in pleasure and luxury. If the second lord is a benefic planet, they take care of the parents, and if the second lord is a malefic planet, they are a rebel to the parents. If the second lord is malefic and situated in the tenth house, the person tries to do business in many fields but faces failure in every field.
2ndHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 11th house:- If the second lord is situated in the eleventh house, the person is enterprising, tactful, famous, like a king-minister everywhere, prosperous, an enjoyer, happy, and like a caretaker of everyone. The person is unhealthy in childhood, but later the person gets many kinds of facilities, as a result of which the person becomes financially very strong.
2ndHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 2nd house lord in the 12th house:- If the second lord is situated in the twelfth house, the person earns wealth by staying away from their native place. Being in the company of bad deeds/corrupt people will give inauspicious results. If the second lord is a benefic planet, they will get auspicious results and the person will be like a struggler. There is a lot of expense in the person's life, due to which the person cannot save much money in their life, and for this, they also suffer mental unrest. If the second lord is malefic and is in the twelfth house, the person holds a discriminatory attitude towards the elder brother, due to which there is no mutual love.

3rdHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 1st house -- Such a person is like having limited knowledge, courageous, wealthy through self-earned wealth, fortunate, owner of real estate, owner of vehicles, having bad friends, and sickly. This person travels abroad or travels for their workplace. If the third lord is present in the first house of a person, then such a person has the capability to become a singer, artist, or actor. The person earns money on the strength of their ability. The person is very courageous but is jealous and angry by nature. If the third lord is malefic, the person can be physically weak.
3rdHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 2nd house -- This person is interested in others' wealth, strong, powerful, benefited by the business of agricultural and mineral products, and influential. But if the third lord is a malefic planet and if it is also the sixth lord, then this person is unhappy, short-lived, and opposed to friends.
3rdHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 3rd house (Own House) – This person is strong, beloved by all, gets benefits from the government, valorous, blessed with sons, wealthy, devoted to gods and brahmins, favored by influential people at the national level, and enjoys happiness. The person spends their life happily and is extremely happy. The person gets the company of friends and relatives. The native gets full support from the younger brother.
3rdHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 4th house – This person is extremely intelligent, wealthy, happy, with a wife, although an expatriate. Such a person is very rich and very happy in life, due to which they enjoy life completely. Even if this person has a good rapport with their father or brother, there is discord with the mother. This person is cruel despite being intelligent. If the third lord is malefic, there is a possibility of the person suffering losses from land and property. The person gets the support of a cruel and ruthless life partner.
3rdHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 5th house – This person is accompanied by friends, benefits from brothers, is happy, wealthy, with a wife, but cruel. They are philanthropic and long-lived, although they have also been seen to be expatriates or living abroad. The person is lucky, rich, and equipped with various types of comforts and luxuries. The native gets a lot of benefits from the elder brother. There is a possibility of the person getting a government job. The person can get the environment of a wealthy family in childhood. If the third lord is afflicted and in the fifth house, the person may have to face problems related to children in married life.
3rdHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 6th house -- This person does not get happiness from the maternal uncle but is the favorite of the maternal aunt. This person is again a landowner, immensely rich, brotherless or having a rift with brothers, or whose brothers are diseased. They suffer from eye diseases and are opponents of friends or relatives. If the third lord is afflicted, the person gets involved in bribery and other unethical acts and is known as such. The native's family may not love the native. The person's health will also not be that good.
3rdHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 7th house –– This person's life partner is handsome/beautiful and fortunate. There is suffering in childhood, and there is also a fear of losing respect if they do bad deeds. This person is usually involved in bad deeds and goes after other women; they usually marry far away. Such a person has affection for their siblings. The person lives a peaceful life with their siblings. If afflicted in the third house, they may have to suffer in childhood.
3rdHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 8th house – This person is wealthy even if they don't have a brother. There is also a fear of falling sick easily. This person has a fear of death at the royal door or being humiliated. Such a person may have to face many obstacles in marriage, due to which their family crises may arise. The person may also be accused of any kind of attack or violence. When the third lord is afflicted, the person is usually likely to be sick. The position of the younger brother will also not be that good.
3rdHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 9th house –– This person is dear to siblings, has a son, and has their fortune elevated through their life partner. They are of a cruel nature, although happy, have good friends, and are the husband of a fortunate wife. They generally like to travel around the country and abroad. After marriage, the person's luck shines. Their brother will progress, which will also benefit the person. There is a strong possibility of getting an opportunity to go on a foreign trip. If the person's third lord is conjoined with malefic planets, then such a person may have some differences with their father.
3rdHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 10th house -- This person is an enjoyer, beloved by women, lucky, strong, pure, always happy, with a wife, wealthy, an expatriate but cruel. They get respect in the national arena, but sometimes inauspicious results are seen in the case of brothers. The life partner of such a person can be of a very angry nature. But the person is very smart and prosperous. That person achieves good success and prosperity in their life.
3rdHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 11th house – This person is a benefactor of friends, gains through brothers, an enjoyer, wealthy by their own earnings, and favored by highly influential people in the national arena. They have real estate and vehicles. They are also travelers of the country and abroad. The native earns a lot of wealth and fame on the strength of their hard work. Such people are willing to serve others, although the person's nature is a bit angry. From the point of view of beauty, the person is not very attractive. Due to their mistakes, they can lose wealth and property.
3rdHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 3rd house lord in the 12th house – Their amount of expenses is high, they are unhappy in father's affairs, afraid of enemies, opponents of friends, and have a cruel nature. But the native's wife is fortunate. They generally travel around the country and abroad. The person may have to lose money due to their mistakes. Being an introvert, such a person likes to be alone. Their brother can also be firm on their words and of a stubborn nature. The person does not get special benefits from their siblings and father. The character traits of the person can also be of a low standard.

4thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 4th house lord in the 1st house –– There is mutual respect between this native and their father, although sometimes enmity from the father's side has also been seen. The native can also abandon ancestral wealth. Despite being adorned with various types of knowledge, they prefer to remain silent in assemblies. This native attains vehicles, wealth, and property, and achieves fame through the father's identity.
4thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 4th house lord in the 2nd house – This native is wealthy, learned, accompanied by family, honorable, courageous, happy, an enjoyer, and benefits from the business of agriculture or minerals. This native may have ideological differences with their father. If conjoined with a malefic planet, they are miserly and opposed to the father.
4thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 4th house lord in the 3rd house – This native is generous, virtuous, a donor, and is rich through self-earned wealth. This native may have opposition with their parents.
4thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 4th house lord in the 4th house - This native is troublesome for parents, although they are a nurturer of the father's friends, famous, endowed with all properties, intelligent, happy, and dear to the wife (or husband if female). This native can hold positions like a minister, member of legislative assembly, or member of parliament.
4thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 4th house lord in the 5th house - This native gets benefits from the father, is religious, dear to most people, respectable, rich by self-earned wealth, and owner of real estate. They are also adept at gambling. The father of this native is wealthy, and the son is long-lived.
4thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 4th house lord in the 6th house - This native can cause loss of ancestral wealth, is unhappy regarding the father, angry, friendless, in debt, and involved in inauspicious deeds. They have many enemies.
4thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 4th house lord in the 7th house - This native is wealthy, owns property, learned, beloved by women, and has friends. Their fortune rises through business and marriage. If the 4th lord is a cruel planet, they may have to face humiliation in old age. This native is the owner of real estate.
4thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 4th house lord in the 8th house - This native may face a lack of wealth, is deprived of the happiness of the father, and suffers losses from vehicles etc. They are unhappy, diseased, and incapable of physical pleasures.
4thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 4th house lord in the 9th house - This native is lucky, rich, learned, religious, popular, has good sons, and is devoted to the father's religion; but if it is a malefic planet, they can also be disrespectful towards the father.
4thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 4th house lord in the 10th house - This native is happy, forgiving, happy due to parents, a chemist, cheerful, and enjoys special types of comforts. They also receive respect from the government. They are successful in business. If the 4th lord is a malefic planet, they are also seen to be unhappy regarding the mother.
4thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 4th house lord in the 11th house - This native can generally earn wealth with the help of their own strength, is born in a high family, generous, virtuous, and lucky. They may have opposition with parents or they are destroyers of ancestral wealth.
4thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 4th house lord in the 12th house - This native progresses by staying away from their place, can be deprived of the father's happiness for some time, and spends in the name of vehicles and property.

5thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 5th house lord in the 1st house:- When the 5th lord is present in the ascendant, the person is intelligent, famous for literature, the pride of the family, wealthy (blessed by Lakshmi), glorious, miserly, selfish, a lover of the Gita, a lover of action, and a lover of knowledge and mantras.
5thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 5th house lord in the 2nd house:- When the 5th lord is present in the second house, the native is rich, a lover of the Gita etc., achieves high positions, famous, receives ancestral property, but has enmity towards the family, a sorrowful heart, angry, and suffers from lustful diseases. If the 5th lord is a malefic planet, it makes the person poor in terms of wealth and property. If the 5th lord is associated with a benefic planet, the person is a hunter, long-lived, and has sons.
5thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 5th house lord in the 3rd house:- When the 5th lord is present in the third house, the person is sweet-spoken, famous among friends, illusive, and courageous. The person's child is extravagant, but the person does not spend in the name of others. If the 5th lord is associated with a benefic planet, they achieve success in every field and are happy, peaceful, and humble.
5thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 5th house lord in the 4th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the fourth house, the person is intelligent, engaged in the father's tasks, devoted to the mother, devoted to the guru, an admirer of scholars, wealthy, and possessor of sharp intelligence.
5thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 5th house lord in the 5th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the fifth house, the person is intelligent, trustworthy, skilled in conversation, well-known, endowed with wealth and property, and religious. But they tend to be worried about their children.
5thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 5th house lord in the 6th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the sixth house, the person is surrounded by enemies, sick, has a son, is humble but a lover of weapons, acts friendly with enemies, and is determined. If it is associated with a malefic planet, they are unhappy regarding wealth and sons. If the 5th lord is a malefic planet, the person can fall into bad company.
5thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 5th house lord in the 7th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the seventh house, the person's wife is well-mannered and has sons. The native is fortunate, sweet-spoken, and respects elders. No one will be able to recognize what the person is really like; they are greedy and extremely miserly.
5thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 5th house lord in the 8th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the eighth house, the person is worried about children, unhappy regarding the life partner, has speech defects, is worried about money, fails in acquiring true knowledge, unstable, and has the potential to be a deceiver.
5thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 5th house lord in the 9th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the ninth house, the person is intelligent, a scholar, lyricist, poet, lover, royal, handsome, a lover of drama, knowledgeable in scriptures, beloved by society, receives vehicles etc. from the king, a writer, the pride of the family, famous, and their son gets a status equal to a king.
5thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 5th house lord in the 10th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the tenth house, the person believes in good deeds, is famous, endowed with maternal happiness, happy, king-like, endowed with children, gains from the government, an author of books, the pride of the family, and earns profits in many ways.
5thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 5th house lord in the 11th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the eleventh house, the person is courageous, a scholar, rich, has sons, a writer, popular, an enjoyer, experiences the fruits of good deeds, a lyricist, and receives the blessings of the king. They are knowledgeable about art and very sociable.
5thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 5th house lord in the 12th house:- When the 5th lord is present in the twelfth house, if the 5th lord is a malefic planet and is in the twelfth house combined with the 12th lord, the person is deprived of children. If it is a benefic planet, they have a son. But the son goes abroad. Due to the presence of the 5th lord in the twelfth house, the person becomes extravagant.

6thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 6th house lord in the 1st house – This person is talkative, a destroyer of enemies, virtuous, honorable, and courageous, but is unhappy regarding their son. This person is disease-free and enterprising. This person's relatives become their enemies. The person has to suffer a lot in life in various ways.
6thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 6th house lord in the 2nd house – This person is clever, engaged in accumulating wealth, courageous, the pride of the family, a good speaker, dedicated to their work, but of wicked nature. Wealth is ruined because of the son. They may be expatriates or living abroad. They are high officials at their workplace.
6thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 6th house lord in the 3rd house – This person is wealthy, forgiving, spends the father's wealth, extremely angry, red-eyed, jealous, and lacks stability. They are immensely wealthy, but brotherless, an expatriate, and sick.
6thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 6th house lord in the 4th house – This person is rich, although there is a difference of opinion between father and son; they are sick, angry, jealous, and fickle. Their parents are also sick. The person suffers because of their son.
6thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 6th house lord in the 5th house – This person's friends are deceitful, friends and wealth are never permanent, and the son is also an enemy of the father. The person is calm, kind, happy, and efficient. There is a fear of the person getting inauspicious results from the government.
6thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 6th house lord in the 6th house – The person is miserly, happy, relatives become enemies but outsiders become close. They are rich and luxurious.
6thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 6th house lord in the 7th house – They are wealthy, virtuous, and famous. But there is a possibility of differences with the life partner.
6thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 6th house lord in the 8th house – This person is an enemy of others, violent towards animals, and diseased. They are capable of overcoming obstacles in the path of progress. If the 6th lord is debilitated, conjoined with an enemy planet, or aspected by an enemy planet, the person suffers various types of pain and sorrow due to disease, etc., and has a fear of death in their mind.
6thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 6th house lord in the 9th house - This person disrespects gurus, is worried about the son's future, is sometimes rich and sometimes poor. Their behavior is not stable. Ideological differences with the father can be seen.
6thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 6th house lord in the 10th house – This person is religious, fond of traveling, courageous, happy, a good speaker, dedicated to their work, and a high official. They are generally self-centered in nature and do not have good relations with the mother. Ideological differences with the father can be seen.
6thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 6th house lord in the 11th house – The person is courageous, virtuous, honorable, and wealthy. The person benefits with the help of four-legged animals. The person is rich and famous. But is not happy regarding children.
6thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 6th house lord in the 12th house – This person is usually an enemy of others, violent towards living beings, and diseased. They are eager to acquire wealth. If the 6th lord is debilitated or conjoined with an enemy planet or in the enemy's sign, the person has to suffer many types of sorrows and pains.

7thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 7th house lord in the 1st house:- If the 7th lord is in the ascendant, there is a possibility of the person getting married to someone close or an acquaintance; they are an enjoyer and handsome. The life partner is a person of good nature and good character. The presence of the 7th lord in the first house is not considered good for married life. Ego problems, ideological differences, and criticism can occur between husband and wife. The person is attracted to sensual and lustful people. They are curious, patient, and can suffer from Vata diseases.
7thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 7th house lord in the 2nd house:- With the 7th lord in the second house, the person benefits from the life partner. The wife can be a working woman. There is a possibility of gaining wealth and property after marriage. The person will earn money from work related to women. Financial gain can happen with the help of women. Wealth and property can be received as an inheritance. The economic condition of the person will improve after marriage. The person can be of a lustful nature. If the 7th lord is conjoined with malefic planets, health problems may arise for the life partner.
7thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 7th house lord in the 3rd house:- When the lord of the seventh house is situated in the third house, the fortune of the person's brother is good. Brothers can stay very far away from the native. The person achieves success in professional life on the strength of their ability and hard work. They can travel very far from their birthplace. The native may also face problems in having children. Hard work in married life may increase.
7thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 7th house lord in the 4th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the fourth house, the person's life partner is an independent thinker and is not under the control of the person. If the 7th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, the life partner does not respect the person. The wife can be a working woman. Good success will be achieved after marriage. The person can go on a foreign trip. The person receives a good education, is intelligent, and gets the happiness of a wife. The person will enjoy vehicles and property. They will be honest, playful, affectionate, truthful, and associated with religious thoughts.
7thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 7th house lord in the 5th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the fifth house, the person is fortunate, has sons, is courageous, virtuous, rich, and honorable but can also be of a wicked mentality. Obedient to the mother. There is a possibility of a love marriage. The native remains in the company of scholars, is kind, and of a good nature. If the 7th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, it can give health-related problems to the wife and children, married life will not be happy, and the children may settle abroad.
7thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 7th house lord in the 6th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the sixth house, the person may have enmity with women, and the wife can be sick and of an angry nature. Before or after marriage, this 7th lord can create problems. If it is conjoined with a malefic planet, the person may die, and there is a fear of TB (tuberculosis). If the 7th lord is aspected by benefic planets or is with benefic planets, only auspicious results will be seen.
7thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 7th house lord in the 7th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the seventh house, the person is sociable, of pure nature, and happy. The mind is kind, energetic, has good health, is full of fame, free from harsh words, and long-lived, but has a weak nature towards the opposite sex. Such a person has a fear of Vata diseases. The person receives the best happiness of married life. The person has a good relationship with their life partner.
7thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 7th house lord in the 8th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the eighth house, problems may arise in the person's marital relations. The health of the person's life partner can be weak. There can be disputes or differences between husband and wife. The life partners do not respect each other. If the 7th lord in the eighth house is badly afflicted, there is a possibility of the death of the person's life partner.
7thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 7th house lord in the 9th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the ninth house, the person is brilliant, handsome, knowledgeable in arts, and their wife is virtuous and radiant. The person is rich in penance and strong arguments. The life partner is a religious person and follows traditional customs. They get the best advice in life from the life partner. After marriage, the native gets success and progress. If the 7th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, the person may have disputes or differences with the life partner.
7thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 7th house lord in the 10th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the tenth house, the person is rebellious, angry, and of a harsh nature. The person is truthful, righteous, and a patient of dental diseases. The person is always active in their profession and workplace and plays the role of an active partner. Achieves good success in professional life. The person emerges as a good officer in their workplace, gets a good name and fame, and achieves very good and excellent success in life. The life partner helps them in professional life. The person earns good money. If the 7th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, problems arise in married life in addition to the workplace.
7thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 7th house lord in the 11th house:- When the 7th lord is situated in the eleventh house, the person gets easily attracted to the opposite sex. They are capable of attracting people of the opposite sex. Gets financial benefits from marriage. The person becomes lucky after marriage. The life partner can be from a richer family than them. The native gets the support of the life partner in their business or profession. The life partner can be connected to their close family.
7thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 7th house lord in the 12th house:- If the lord of the seventh house is situated in the twelfth house, the person's life partner is of an extravagant nature. The native themselves will be of a miserly nature, but the life partner will be an aspirer of a luxurious lifestyle. There is also a possibility of a dispute between the person and their wife due to expenses. The person's life partner may suffer from health problems and has a possibility of having a chronic disease. They may also have to stay away from the life partner. They easily get attracted to the opposite sex. If conjoined with a malefic planet, it can also cause the death of the life partner.

8thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 8th house lord in the 1st house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the first house, there is an adverse effect on the health of the person. Such a native may have a congenital disease. There may be problems like sores on the body, and you may suffer distress from your higher officials. If the 8th lord in the first house is in its own sign or exalted, the native will get various types of auspicious results.
8thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 8th house lord in the 2nd house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the second house, the person may have eye and teeth problems. This position is not good for the person's wealth and family. Such a person can live separately from their family or lineage. If the 8th lord is a malefic planet, the native continues to have problems with venereal diseases and accidents.
8thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 8th house lord in the 3rd house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the third house, the person has a long life. Such a person does not have good relations with their father or brothers and remains mentally disturbed. Such a person does not gain fame as a servant.
8thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 8th house lord in the 4th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the fourth house, the person will not get the happiness of the mother or the mother will be sick, meaning this situation will create trouble for the mother. The financial condition of such a person will not be good, and they will become friendless. This position of the 8th lord is not auspicious for the person's land, property, and vehicle. Problems of accidents can arise.
8thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 8th house lord in the 5th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the fifth house, the person will be wealthy and will have a long life with fewer children. Such a person has a deep storehouse of history and occult knowledge.
8thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 8th house lord in the 6th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the sixth house, the person will achieve victory over their rivals. The body of such a person remains diseased. In childhood, they will have a fear of water and snake bites.
8thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 8th house lord in the 7th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the seventh house, the marital status of the person will not be good. Such a person can have a second marriage, i.e., there can be a possibility of divorce in married life or perhaps the life partner may stay away from them. This situation will also not be good for the person's business.
8thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 8th house lord in the 8th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the eighth house, the person will be long-lived. Such a person will acquire wealth through ancestral property or secretly. Such a person should keep their character excellent. They will criticize others.
8thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 8th house lord in the 9th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the ninth house, the person will be an atheist or lowly in matters of religion. The life partner of such a native is not of a good nature, and relations with the father will not be good.
8thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 8th house lord in the 10th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the tenth house, the person's relations with their parents will not be good. Such a native can be associated with the communication sector. Such a person is enriched with occult knowledge, meaning they can be a good astrologer or tantric.
8thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 8th house lord in the 11th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the eleventh house, the person may have trouble regarding wealth and property in childhood, although the end time will be good. Such a person may get secret wealth and property. Such a native will have secret relationships.
8thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 8th house lord in the 12th house:- Due to the presence of the 8th lord in the twelfth house, the person will like to spend money on bad deeds. Such a person can maintain relationships with more than one person. The person can travel abroad and obtain secret wealth from abroad.

9thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 9th house lord in the 1st house:- If the lord of the ninth house is present in the first house, the native highly respects their parents, teachers, and elders. The native worships with devotion. They will be a person with religious thoughts. The native achieves prosperity through their own efforts. The person is attractive, educated, and earns a lot of fame; they are rich with land and property. The native has a respectable place in society. Such a native propagates spiritual subjects.
9thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 9th house lord in the 2nd house:- The second house is the house of wealth. If the 9th lord is present in the second house of the native, then such a person receives wealth as an inheritance. The person is rich, knowledgeable, and everyone's favorite. The native gets immense happiness from the son and wife. The person has both movable and immovable property and gets a respectable place in society. If the lord of the ninth house is afflicted by malefic planets and is present in the second house, the native gets opposite results, meaning the person can be poor. The native may have to face sorrow from their children and wife.
9thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 9th house lord in the 3rd house:- When the 9th lord is present in the third house, the native has a deep interest in music and musical instruments. The native gets the opportunity for pilgrimage and foreign travel. The person is also attracted towards writing on religion and spiritual subjects. Such a native earns money through their writing and public speaking. The person will get the support of their younger siblings. If the 9th lord is afflicted by a malefic planet, the native becomes a destroyer of ancestral property. The writing skills of the person may decline. Music and musical instruments can create obstacles in the progress of the native.
9thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 9th house lord in the 4th house:- When the 9th lord is situated in the fourth house, the person gets a good education. The native gets all kinds of happiness in life like vehicles, houses, and property. Such a person can also get a ruling position. The lifespan of the person is long. The native gets the support of family members. Such a person may have a business related to real estate. If the 9th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet and present in the fourth house, the person's father may have to face a problem. Due to such adverse situations, the person's mother may remain unhappy. The person can also be separated due to differences with parents.
9thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 9th house lord in the 5th house:- When the 9th lord is in the fifth house, the person's parents will be very rich, due to which the person inherits wealth and property. The person receives a good education, as a result of which the person becomes obedient and very beloved by the elders. The person is rich and charitable by nature. The person is the owner of a luxurious house. The native can get a good post in any government service. If the 9th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, the native can get opposite results.
9thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 9th house lord in the 6th house:- If the lord of the ninth house is present in the sixth house, that person can attain a high position in government service like a judicial post. The native will have a good income from their profession. The person earns a lot of money in their life and becomes rich by their own efforts. The person benefits from the service provided by their servants. Such people get success in legal matters. If the lord of the ninth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, the native remains surrounded by debts. Due to debt or due to legal disputes and lawsuits, the person destroys the father's property. The native may have to face trouble from enemies. The family members of such a person do not support them. Suffering from an incurable disease, their father may die a premature death.
9thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 9th house lord in the 7th house:- When the 9th lord is present in the seventh house, that person is born into a rich family. The person highly respects their elders. The person gets a good wife. After marriage, the luck of the native shines. There is a possibility of the native going abroad or getting money from abroad. The person can also get a high position abroad. The person is of a religious nature. The native can spend life abroad with any of their religious gurus. If the 9th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet or is debilitated, the native can get opposite results. The person's father may remain sick. The married life of the native is probably unhappy.
9thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 9th house lord in the 8th house:- If the lord of the ninth house is in the eighth house of the native, the person can get the benefit of ancestral property. Such a person can be a great scholar associated with some research work. The person achieves depth in their life. If the 9th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet and present in the eighth house, the native faces many difficulties in life. The person's father is usually sick. In such a situation, the person's father may die a premature death. Due to the person being poor or for any other reason, their wife may also die.
9thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 9th house lord in the 9th house:- When the 9th lord is present in the ninth house, the native is very lucky and their personality is also attractive. The native gets happiness and support from their siblings. The person's father is of a religious nature, due to which worship and devotional songs are done every day in the native's house. The person gets a good life partner. Their son can achieve the best accomplishments. The family of the native gets a respectable place in society. They get support from friends and family.
9thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 9th house lord in the 10th house:- If the 9th lord is present in the tenth house, such a person can get a high position in government service and can hold the post of a ruler or similar. The family of the native is respectable in society. The person is a law-abiding individual. The economic condition of the person will gradually improve; they can become rich by their own efforts. Such people can also be involved in spiritual activities. If the 9th lord is a malefic planet and is present in the tenth house, that person may receive punishment from the government for some reason. In such a situation, the person can be defamed. The person may lose their job or face financial loss.
9thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 9th house lord in the 11th house:- When the 9th lord is present in the eleventh house, the person is very obedient to elders. Their father will have an influential personality. The person's family is associated with spiritual works. The native will get the support of their friends. If the lord of the ninth house is conjoined with malefic planets and situated in the eleventh house, the person can be betrayed by their friends. Due to the bad condition of the father, there can be a shortage of money. The person can be involved in bad deeds. They can also do illegal work for profit.
9thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 9th house lord in the 12th house:- When the 9th lord is present in the twelfth house, the person is of a religious nature. Such a person can adopt the profession of giving philosophical discourses. If the lord planet of the ninth house is afflicted by any malefic planet, the native will not have any movable or immovable property. Their life can be full of struggles. Success runs away from such a person.

10thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 10th house lord in the 1st house:- If the lord of the tenth house is situated in the first house of the native, the person creates their destiny through their own efforts. Such a native is hardworking. The person has good respect in society. Such people can also be successful as freelancers. The person's career will shape their personality. The native can have their own business. The person will be the head of their institution and will also have leadership ability. Such a native can be influenced by the father's personality. The native can also get an opportunity to live abroad. If the lord of the tenth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, the person may have a difference of opinion with the mother on some matter. But there will be good coordination with the father.
10thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 10th house lord in the 2nd house:- The second house is the house of wealth. In astrology, the second house is of wealth, speech, eyes, and family, etc. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the second house of the native, the person's luck will be good. The person can inherit immovable property. The person may also have to take over the responsibility of their ancestors' business. Such a person remains firm on their words. The student life of the native is successful. Can show good results in school examinations. A government job can become the source of income for the native. The native will earn money through their own efforts and can achieve success abroad. Their elder siblings will be rich and will get good results in life. If the 10th lord is afflicted by malefic planets, the native's mother can be selfish. Due to losing the family business, the person can become poor and penniless.
10thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 10th house lord in the 3rd house:- The third house is considered the house of efforts. In astrology, the third house represents courage, younger siblings, throat, etc. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the third house, the person can take advantage of their family. Such a person can earn money by making their hobby a profession. The person can be a writer or a successful professor. The native can also gain fame in sales, marketing, or as a YouTuber. The native is very lucky. The person can get the support of friends. Such a person can be a successful businessman or manager. The native can get opportunities to travel in connection with work. Such a person is also a successful speaker. The number of siblings of the native can be less.
10thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 10th house lord in the 4th house:- The fourth house is considered the house of happiness. In astrology, the fourth house is the significator of mother, vehicles, property, land, mind, happiness, education, and material comforts, etc. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the fourth house of the native, the person can hold a high position. They have knowledge of many fields. The person can be involved in the business of real estate, household goods, or automobiles. Childhood friends can be the native's business partners. The native will have a good relationship with their family. That person will be respectable in society. The native will enjoy the happiness of a house and vehicle. Their first son can do some commendable work abroad. Their elder brother will be able to get a good place in life. If the lord of the tenth house is a malefic planet and it is situated in the fourth house, the person may have to face emotional problems. Due to the inauspicious position of the planets, the person can lose their land.
10thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 10th house lord in the 5th house:- The fifth house is considered the trine or the house of Lakshmi. In astrology, the fifth house is of higher education, children, love, and talent. If the lord of the tenth house is in the fifth house of the native, a situation of Raj Yoga is created in the person's life. That person is very intelligent. The native receives higher education. The person can be a successful administrator, astrologer, or religious leader. The person is the king of their field. Their elder brother has a long life. The pious life of the native will become an ideal for others. The life of such a person passes happily. The native can be interested in sports, entertainment, media, or cinema or any other creative field and can start their career by choosing any one of these in the future. Apart from this, the native may be willing to invest money in the stock market and various risky tasks. If the 10th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, their mother may face health problems or for some reason may have to move away from the mother.
10thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 10th house lord in the 6th house:- The sixth house is considered the house of enemies, debts, and diseases. In astrology, the sixth house is also related to diseases, debts, enemies, and maternal uncle. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the sixth house of the native, such a person can be associated with jail or the judicial field. If the condition of the planets is good, the person gets the opportunity to earn more money. If the opposite happens, the person can be involved in legal disputes. In such a situation, the person may have to go to jail. Such a person may have a hospital-related business where they can achieve success. If the planets are in an auspicious position, the person can also achieve good success in the oil business. If the 10th lord is strong, the native can perform well in competitive exams. The workplace of the native's father will be good. The siblings will also progress in the future. But if the 10th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, they will only get failure in every field.
10thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 10th house lord in the 7th house:- The seventh house is considered the house of marriage and business. In astrology, the seventh house is of life partner, business, partnership, and foreign travel. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the seventh house, the personality of such a person is highly attractive. Such people are dedicated to their work. The person's life partner is very beautiful and gentle. Their wife is highly educated. They are satisfied in their married life. Such a person is rich and generally gets the opportunity to travel abroad. The work of the person is talking to people, being involved in partnership works. In business, the native's wife advises them, due to which they continue to get support from the wife in business. Such people earn a lot of money abroad. The native's elder brother or sister can live abroad. If the lord of the tenth house is a malefic planet, the person can be of a lustful nature. In such a situation, the person can form relationships with more than one person.
10thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 10th house lord in the 8th house:- In astrology, the eighth house is of age, death, sudden events, sins of previous births, occult knowledge, and spirituality. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the eighth house in the native's horoscope, the person can be a researcher, journalist, astrologer, miner, spy, or accountant. If the planets are in a strong position, the person can be appointed to a high position for a short time. There will be progress in the life of the person's elder brother or sister. The thoughts of spirituality can be strong in the mind of such a person. If the tenth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, the person may have a dispute with their father. Such people can be criminals or smugglers. Usually, such people are engaged in some secret activities. The lifespan of the person can be shortened.
10thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 10th house lord in the 9th house:- In astrology, the ninth house is of luck, religion, father, higher education, and foreign travel. The ninth house is considered the most important house. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the ninth house, a Raj Yoga is formed in the person's life. Such people are of a religious nature. The person can inherit a business. That person receives traditional education from the family. Such a person has a deep attachment to the family. The native can get opportunities to travel in connection with work. Such people can earn money as lawyers, professors, or doctors. Their son will be obedient. If the planets are strong, the person can also be a scientist or mathematician. If the 10th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, the native may have to stay away from the father.
10thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 10th house lord in the 10th house:- The tenth house is considered the house of karma (actions). In astrology, the tenth house is of action, state, leadership ability, responsibility, and fame. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the tenth house of the native, such a person is confident. The native is influenced by the good reputation of the father. The father will be rich. The personality of the person is attractive. Such a person has a respectable place in society. The native also gets the happiness of house and vehicle. If the planets are in an auspicious position, the condition of the person's life is good. The person earns a lot of money and achieves prosperity and fame. If the 10th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, the person may have to work under the influence of others.
10thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 10th house lord in the 11th house:- The eleventh house is considered the house of gains. In astrology, the eleventh house is of income, profit, elder siblings, friends, and willpower. If the lord of the tenth house is situated in the eleventh house of the native, such a person gets a lot of money from their livelihood. Such a person gets the reward of their efforts. The person can work in a multinational company. The person can help others in providing employment. If the 10th lord is malefic, the person can be betrayed by friends.
10thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 10th house lord in the 12th house:- In astrology, the twelfth house is of expenditure, loss, salvation, foreign migration, and occult knowledge. If the lord of the tenth house is present in the twelfth house of the native, the person can get an opportunity to work abroad. If the planets are in an auspicious position, the person will be of a saintly nature. Such a person can get a small job. If the 10th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, it will create problems in the workplace.

11thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 11th house lord in the 1st house:- In astrology, the first house is also called the ascendant house, meaning the person themselves. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the first house, that person is born into a prosperous family. The person receives higher education. The native's personality is attractive. Such a native earns money through their own efforts. If there is an elder brother, they get help from him. The person keeps getting opportunities from time to time in life. If the lord of the eleventh house is conjoined with a malefic planet or is debilitated and present in the first house, the native does not get special benefits from friends. The native may have to lose money because of an elder brother or sister, along with facing a shortage of money. There can be a lack of opportunities to be successful in the person's life.
11thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 11th house lord in the 2nd house:- The second house is the house of wealth. In astrology, the second house signifies wealth, speech, eyes, and family. If the lord of the eleventh house of the person is present in the second house of the person, the person is an influential speaker. The native earns money from financial institutions like banking. The person has affectionate relations with their elder siblings. A person gets benefits from friends. The person earns adequate wealth in life. Such a native usually receives awards from various fields. If the 11th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet or is debilitated and present in the second house, the native can get opposite results, meaning instead of being rich, the native may face a lack of money. In such a situation, the elder brother or sister of the person may face financial problems. The person may have eyesight problems. Problems may arise regarding the native's first son.
11thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 11th house lord in the 3rd house:- The third house is considered the house of efforts. In astrology, the third house is of courage, younger siblings, throat, and valor. If the lord of the eleventh house is situated in the third house of the native, the person becomes a musician or singer or has an interest in this field. They move forward in life with their energy and achieve success. The person can be the youngest among their siblings. The condition of siblings can be good, and full benefits are seen to be received from siblings. The person has subordinate employees, the child is lucky and of a religious nature, loves to travel, and the person can benefit by traveling. If the 11th lord is afflicted by a malefic planet, the native may have ear-related problems.
11thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 11th house lord in the 4th house:- The fourth house is considered the house of happiness. In astrology, the fourth house is the significator of mother, vehicles, property, land, mind, happiness, education, and material comforts, etc. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the fourth house of the native, such a person is well-educated and an honorable person. They earn fame precisely because of knowledge and scholarship. The person can get benefits from real estate. The person can earn money through rent. The servants of such a person are very loyal. The native gets the support of parents. Usually, the person is involved in spiritual works. The person also enjoys land and property. Such a native lives a happy life. If the native's 11th lord is afflicted and present in the fourth house, the person may have to face emotional problems. The native may also have to face the problem of lack of money to complete studies.
11thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 11th house lord in the 5th house:- The fifth house is considered the trine or the house of Lakshmi. In astrology, the fifth house is of education, children, love, and talent. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the fifth house, the nature of such a person is very good. The person will gain expertise in making predictions. They will work to expand their father's business. The native can also earn money from the stock market. The person's child will be happy. This child will spread the fame and glory of the person. All the desires of the person will be fulfilled. If the 11th lord is afflicted and situated in the fifth house, the person exhibits foolishness. The person may have to face losses in the stock market. The native may lack spirituality.
11thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 11th house lord in the 6th house:- The sixth house is considered the house of enemies, debts, and diseases. In astrology, the sixth house is also connected with diseases, debts, enemies, and the maternal family. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the sixth house in the native's horoscope, the person collects money from litigation, nursing homes, military work, or any other type of service. That person can also be involved in the field of exercise, etc. If the lord of the eleventh house is afflicted and present in the sixth house, the debt burden of the native will increase. Such a native can be involved in court cases. The person can lose the best opportunities in life due to their bad behavior. Such people are usually involved in some anti-social activities. The person remains unstable most of the time.
11thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 11th house lord in the 7th house:- The seventh house is considered the house of marriage and business. In astrology, the seventh house is of life partner, business, partnership, and foreign travel. If the 11th lord is present in the seventh house of the native, such a person can marry a rich girl. The person behaves in a friendly manner with the wife. There can be promotion or benefits from abroad. Their father acquires wealth and property through his own efforts and is successful in life. The native can be benefited by an influential personality. If the lord of the eleventh house of the native is a malefic planet, the native can also be involved in unethical acts.
11thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 11th house lord in the 8th house:- In astrology, the eighth house is of lifespan, death, sudden events, sins of previous births, occult knowledge, and spirituality. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the eighth house of the native, such a person can acquire secret wealth by any means. The person does respectful work towards their elders. If the 11th lord is a malefic planet or is conjoined with a malefic planet, the native can be involved in unethical acts. The person may have to face a financial crisis. Such a native can suffer at the hands of a thief or cheat. The child of that person can also be involved in inauspicious acts. They will also suffer because of the child.
11thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 11th house lord in the 9th house:- In astrology, the ninth house is of luck, religion, father, higher education, and foreign travel. The ninth house is considered the most important house in the entire zodiac. If the lord of the eleventh house is situated in the ninth house of the native, such a person gets the benefit of ancestral property. The person is wealthy and fortunate. The native also enjoys the happiness of vehicles and houses. That person is of a religious nature and kind. Therefore, the person continues to provide service in religious ceremonies. The native can be in a traditional business or earn through publishing, travel, or law. If the 11th lord is conjoined with malefic planets, the person can suffer because of their elder brother or sister.
11thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 11th house lord in the 10th house:- The tenth house is considered the house of karma. In astrology, the tenth house is of work, state, leadership ability, responsibility, and fame. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the tenth house, the personality of such a person is honest and simple. The person can be a businessman by profession. Usually, the person keeps achieving accomplishments. The native can receive awards in the educational field. The person fulfills their desires and dreams according to their capacity. If the 11th lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, the person is highly extravagant, due to which the person is not afraid to spend.
11thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 11th house lord in the 11th house:- The eleventh house is considered the house of gains. In astrology, the eleventh house is of income, profit, elder siblings, friends, and receiving awards. If the lord of the eleventh house of the native is present in the eleventh house itself, the person gets benefits from family and friends. The person has good relations with their siblings. The person takes advantage of such opportunities, as a result of which the native accumulates adequate wealth in their life. That person enjoys every kind of happiness and lives a happy life. Such people are also engaged in spiritual activities. If the 11th lord is afflicted, the person may have a lack of opportunities. They may rely on their elder brother or sister for help.
11thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 11th house lord in the 12th house:- In astrology, the twelfth house is of expenditure, loss, salvation, foreign migration, and occult knowledge. If the lord of the eleventh house is present in the twelfth house of the native, the tolerance in the native is immense. The person keeps getting opportunities to acquire knowledge. Such people can earn money through spiritual works. The native may have a business related to import-export. That person can receive money from abroad. If the 11th lord is afflicted and is in the twelfth house, the person may have eyesight problems. Or the person may suffer from an incurable disease. Apart from this, their brother, sister, or friend can suffer from a disease and money can be spent on their treatment.

12thHouse_Lord.1: Results of the 12th house lord in the 1st house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the first house of the native, the person is soft-spoken. Such a person is attractive and gentle. The native keeps getting opportunities to travel abroad. The nature of the person is very restless. The tolerance of such a person is high. If the lord of the twelfth house is afflicted, the person may have health-related problems. Or such a person may have some digestion problems. Such a native is narrow-minded and also hates others. The native may perhaps have to face money problems in life. The person may also have sleeping problems.
12thHouse_Lord.2: Results of the 12th house lord in the 2nd house:- The second house is the house of wealth. If the 12th lord is in the second house, such a person is of a religious nature. The native earns a good name and respect among the public. Such a person is sweet-spoken and frugal (saves money). Usually, the person spends money only on auspicious works. The life of such a person passes happily. If the 12th lord is malefic, there is a burden of debt in the person's life. The native has differences of opinion with their family members. Due to eye problems, the person's eyesight may become weak. They may have a bad habit of lying.
12thHouse_Lord.3: Results of the 12th house lord in the 3rd house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the third house of the native, such a person is religious by nature. Usually, the person gets an opportunity to travel abroad. Such a person does not have the courage to achieve any goal. If the 12th lord is malefic and present in the third house, the person does not have good relations with their own siblings. The person may have to face some problems because of siblings. Such people keep wasting their energy for entertainment. The reproductive capacity of such a native can be affected. The person may have some problems in the ears or throat, etc. Despite making a lot of effort in the field of writing, the person may have to face failure.
12thHouse_Lord.4: Results of the 12th house lord in the 4th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the fourth house of the native, such a person likes to live abroad. That person does not have good relations with their own family members. The native does not get to enjoy the happiness of their house and land-property themselves. Their mother is usually sick or they have a rift with her. The native can get the benefit of foreign travel. The person may have to face some problems in life regarding vehicles. Even if there is a vehicle in the house, the same is seen in their case.
12thHouse_Lord.5: Results of the 12th house lord in the 5th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the fifth house of the native, problems can arise in the education of such a person. That person does not have the ability to control their thoughts. Such a person can suffer from problems related to the son or may suffer sorrow from the son. Due to life's problems, the native can turn towards a religious life. Usually, the person may lack self-respect.
12thHouse_Lord.6: Results of the 12th house lord in the 6th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the sixth house, the health of the native remains good, due to which the person lives a long life. The appearance of the native is attractive. In terms of wealth and property, the person is rich and prosperous. Such a person is going to be victorious over enemies. If the 12th lord is afflicted, the person may have a dispute with the mother over something. Such a person may lack the happiness of children. Children may not obey them. Due to a legal dispute, the native may suffer financial loss.
12thHouse_Lord.7: Results of the 12th house lord in the 7th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the seventh house of the native, the person's relations with people of their own society get ruined. The person does not get good education and happiness from the wife. The native can have enmity with their colleagues. The person lacks land and property, although there is a possibility of receiving money from abroad.
12thHouse_Lord.8: Results of the 12th house lord in the 8th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the eighth house of the native, the person is soft-spoken and endowed with all good qualities. The person lives a long life and makes considerable progress in spiritual life to acquire knowledge. Such people can be associated with medical services like a doctor in a hospital, gynecologist, emergency service, etc.
12thHouse_Lord.9: Results of the 12th house lord in the 9th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the ninth house of the native, the native's conduct is religious and the person has a philosophical perspective. Such a person can be associated with the educational field. The person can have some business related to import-export. There is a possibility of the native settling abroad. The person can also be in the role of a travel or pilgrimage organizer. If the 12th lord is afflicted, distrust towards the religious field arises in the mind of that person. The person is not satisfied in their married life. There can be a problem regarding the father. Such a native does not respect their elders. The person may also not respect their wife, friends, and teachers.
12thHouse_Lord.10: Results of the 12th house lord in the 10th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the tenth house, such a person is very hardworking. The person keeps getting the benefit of traveling to different places for the job associated with their profession or the person repeatedly changes jobs/ideas. For promotion, the person needs the help of an influential person. Such a person can become famous as a spiritual guru. Local people can also work in a jail, hospital, or nursing home. If the lord of the twelfth house is a malefic planet, that person may not get happiness from children. Such a person also gets less happiness from the father.
12thHouse_Lord.11: Results of the 12th house lord in the 11th house:- If the lord of the twelfth house is present in the eleventh house of the native, such a person likes to stay in solitude. The native keeps getting benefits from others. The person can be a trader of precious gems, pearls, etc., to earn money. The person's business will run well but the native may not get any special benefit from it. Usually, such people keep spending their money to fulfill their desires and for showing off. The number of enemies of the native can also increase. The native's brother can be disabled (handicapped). The person may perhaps have to spend more money for their brother. The person may have trouble hearing.
12thHouse_Lord.12: Results of the 12th house lord in the 12th house:- If the 12th lord is present in the twelfth house of the native, the personality of the person is attractive. The vision of the native is good. Such a person is rich and enjoys all the comforts and luxuries of life. There is a lot of expenditure in their life. That person is attracted towards traveling. The native remains satisfied with their life partner. If the person's life has a strong inclination towards religion and spirituality, the person can spend money on religious and social works. If the lord of the twelfth house is afflicted and present in the twelfth house, the native can get opposite results. In such a situation, the person can remain disturbed and unstable.
